page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.2xlarge is an arm64-based server instance powered by an Ampere Altra processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 8 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It operates on a KVM hypervisor, includes a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps, and does not feature local storage or GPU accelerators.

Benchmark results indicate average performance across most multi-threaded and memory-bound operations. The instance achieved a multi-core Geekbench score of 6111.0 and a multi-core stress-ng CPU performance score of 14296.73. However, single-core performance is a notable tradeoff, with Geekbench single-core (1095.0) and Passmark CPU encryption (1303.69) scoring in the lower tier. Memory bandwidth remains stable, reaching 568.34 GB/sec for small cached blocks and 86.12 GB/sec for large uncached blocks.

Given its dedicated Arm architecture and balanced resource allocation, the ecs.g6r.2xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for multi-threaded workloads that benefit from predictable physical core allocation without hyperthreading overhead. It is well-suited for general-purpose workloads such as static web serving, where it demonstrated a throughput of 10.65 GB/sec, database operations, and multi-threaded software compilation. It is less suitable for single-threaded tasks or heavy cryptographic operations due to lower single-core performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.2xlarge is an arm64 general-purpose server instance powered by an 8-core Ampere Altra processor running at 2.8 GHz. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs with a 1:1 physical-to-virtual core ratio, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks show average multi-core capabilities, including a Geekbench multi-core score of 6111.0 and a static web serving throughput of 10.65 GB/sec. However, single-core performance is a tradeoff, as shown by lower single-threaded compression and encryption scores. This instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for multi-threaded, arm64-native workloads such as web serving, database operations, and software compilation, while being less optimal for single-threaded or cryptographically intense applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g6r.2xlarge is an arm64 general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated Ampere Altra cores, 32 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering stable multi-threaded performance.

tagline: An arm64-based general-purpose instance featuring dedicated physical cores and balanced memory for stable multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by an 8-core Ampere Altra arm64 processor at 2.8 GHz
Equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM and 2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Dedicated CPU allocation with 1 thread per physical core
Average multi-core performance for web serving and database operations
Lower single-core performance presents a tradeoff for single-threaded tasks
Best suited for arm64-native applications, software compilation, and web servers
